title: How NAD+ Supports Brain Health as You Age: What the Research Shows
tags: NAD+, brain health, cognitive aging, memory, neurodegeneration, women over 40, CoQ10
summary: NAD+ levels in the brain decline by up to 50 percent between ages 40 and 60, impairing neuronal energy production and DNA repair, but lifestyle strategies and targeted precursor supplementation can help restore and maintain cognitive vitality.
featured_image_alt: Woman practicing yoga outdoors representing mental clarity, brain health, and longevity after 40
